title: YC AI Startups 2026: The Complete Batch Breakdown (W26 & S25) | TLDL | TLDL
full_text:
Blog
YC AI Startups 2026: The Complete Batch Breakdown (W26 & S25)
By TLDL February 19, 2026 (Updated: Feb 27, 2026 )
Every AI startup from YC's recent batches, analyzed. What they do, who's building them, and which ones are gaining real traction. Updated March 2026.
Share Copy link
YC AI Startups 2026: The Complete Batch Breakdown
Y Combinator's 2026 batches are roughly 60% AI companies — up from 40% in 2024. The accelerator has backed some of the biggest names in AI (Cursor, Perplexity, Scale AI, Runway), and the latest batches show where the smart money thinks AI is heading next: vertical agents, infrastructure plays, and AI-native workflows replacing entire SaaS categories.
This guide tracks every notable AI company from recent YC batches. We've added context you won't find on YC's own directory: which founders have appeared on AI podcasts, what traction metrics are public, and which companies are gaining momentum based on community signals.
How to Use This Guide
For each company, we include:
What they do — Product description and target market
Batch — When they participated in YC
Funding — Known rounds and investors
Why they matter — Competitive positioning and what makes them interesting
Winter 2026 Batch (W26)
Notable AI Companies
Company Description Website Category
Beacon Health AI agents for primary care beaconhealth.ai HealthTech
Lucid AI workflow orchestration lucid.so DevTools
Motion AI project management usemotion.com Productivity
Pace AI accounting paceup.io Fintech
Fall 2025 Batch (F25)
Notable AI Companies
Company Description Website Category
Arcade AI-powered CRM arcade.ai Sales
Norm AI AI compliance normai.io Legal
Commission AI sales commissions commission.io Sales
Truefit AI fitness coaching truefit.io HealthTech
Summer 2025 Batch (S25)
Notable AI Companies
Company Description Website Category
Manus AI general agents manuscripts.im DevTools
Bounti AI bounty hunting bounti.io Security
MindEye AI consciousness research mindeye.ai Research
Previous Batches - Notable AI Companies
YC W24-F24
Company Category Status
Anysphere (Cursor) Coding $100M+ ARR
Codestral (Mistral) Coding Acquired
Adept Agents $650M+ raised
Harvey Legal AI $100M+ raised
Glean Enterprise Search $300M+ raised
Scale AI Data $1B+ raised
YC W23-F23
Company Category Status
Perplexity AI Search $500M+ raised
Runway Video AI $200M+ raised
Character AI Consumer Acquired
Hugging Face ML Platform $1B+ raised
Company Profiles
Anysphere (Cursor)
What : AI-first code editor
Batch : YC S22
Funding : $100M+ Series A
ARR : $50M+
Why it matters : Changed how developers write code
Competition : VS Code, Zed
Adept
What : AI agents for enterprise automation
Batch : YC W23
Funding : $650M+ total
Why it matters : Pioneer in enterprise agents
Competition : Microsoft, Salesforce
Harvey
What : AI for legal professionals
Batch : YC W22
Funding : $100M+ Series B
Why it matters : First major vertical AI success
Competition : Casetext, LegalZoom
Glean
What : Enterprise AI search
Batch : YC S20
Funding : $300M+ Series C
ARR : $50M+
Why it matters : Enterprise search redefined
YC AI Statistics
By the Numbers (2025)
Total AI companies : 400+
Average batch size : 250 companies
AI percentage : ~60% of each batch
Total funding raised : $10B+
Success Rate
Became unicorns : ~2% of batch
Raised Series A : ~20%
Active after 2 years : ~40%
How to Get Into YC
For AI Startups
Apply early - YC rolls, apply anytime
Build in public - Share demos, metrics
Focus on growth - Show clear trajectory
Demo day matters - Prepare extensively
What YC Looks For
Founder quality - Can you execute?
Large market - Can this be big?
Technical differentiation - What's your moat?
Traction - Users, revenue, growth
YC Alternatives
Program AI Focus Batch Size Notes
Techstars 20% AI 200/year More hands-on
Founder Institute 15% AI 500/year Global reach
a16z Speedrun 100% AI Rolling For AI startups
Alchemist 30% AI 20/batch Enterprise
